formulas.opportunity_concentration_score: Weighted average of available route_participation (40%), target_share (35%), and air_yard_share (25%) inputs, renormalized across present fields only.
formulas.routes_consistency_index: 1 - mean absolute deviation divided by mean route participation, clipped to [0, 1], using only feature-season weekly rows with route participation present.
formulas.target_earning_index: target_share_season_avg divided by route_participation_season_avg when both inputs are present and route participation is positive.

leakage_guardrails.season_input_scope: Only canonical wr_player_seasons rows from the same feature season are used.
leakage_guardrails.weekly_input_scope: Only canonical wr_player_weeks rows from the same feature season are used.

role_fields.air_yard_share_season_avg: Average prior-season weekly air-yard share from canonical WR season rows when present.
role_fields.opportunity_concentration_score: Weighted average of available route_participation (40%), target_share (35%), and air_yard_share (25%) inputs, renormalized across present fields only.
role_fields.route_participation_season_avg: Average prior-season route participation from canonical WR season rows.
role_fields.routes_consistency_index: 1 - mean absolute deviation divided by mean route participation, clipped to [0, 1], using only feature-season weekly rows with route participation present.
role_fields.target_earning_index: target_share_season_avg divided by route_participation_season_avg when both inputs are present and route participation is positive.
role_fields.target_share_season_avg: Average prior-season weekly target share from canonical WR season rows when present.
